creator: xelalex_maker@web.de
text:
Created attachment 177111
Error log when starting from shell

Upgrading from LyX 2.1.5 to 2.2.1 from Quarterly replaced all GUI-icons by their alternative descriptions in plain text.

When started from a shell, it obviously complains about every icon it can't load – see attached log – although the files are there:

% stat /usr/local/share/lyx/images/file-open.svgz
113 2329195 -rw-r--r-- 1 root wheel 4739414 5274 "Jan  1 01:00:00 1970" "Nov  5 03:17:44 2016" "Nov 17 09:58:24 2016" "Nov  5 03:17:44 2016" 32768 16 0 /usr/local/share/lyx/images/file-open.svgz
